scale.h1: text-6xl md:text-7xl lg:text-[5rem] leading-[0.9] tracking-normal font-normal
scale.label: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-bold text-slate-500

rules: Use Bebas Neue ONLY for Headings (h1-h3).
Use Inter for all body text, buttons, and navigation.
Headings should have tight leading (leading-none or leading-tight).
Labels should always be uppercase with wide tracking.

buttons.primary: bg-[#E50914] hover:bg-[#C2000F] text-white px-8 py-3 rounded-full font-inter font-medium transition-all shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(229,9,20,0.39)] hover:shadow-[0_6px_20px_rgba(229,9,20,0.23)] hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50 px-8 py-3 rounded-full font-inter font-medium transition-all
buttons.glass: bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/20 px-8 py-3 rounded-full transition-all

cards.glass_service: bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 rounded-2xl p-8
cards.dark_approach: bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-white/5 p-8 rounded-xl hover:border-[#E50914]/50 transition-colors group

features: Glowing red nodes (#E50914) at major cities

images.logo_placeholder: Use text 'Tixo Global' in Bebas Neue, font-size 2xl, tracking-wide

hero.text_style: High contrast, big bold Bebas Neue heading

ticker.content: University Logos (Use text names in a modern serif font if logos unavailable, or icons)

services.style: Grid of 6 Glass cards on light grey bg
services.hover: Cards tilt slightly towards mouse (3D effect) or lift up

process.style: Step-by-step horizontal flow with connecting lines
process.icons: Lucide React icons in Red circles

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds, only for small accents or text.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states.
